text: There is an emptiness and coolness in these spaces, awash with the glow of artificial light. The interplay of reflections and muted neon sparks wonder about the nature of work, creation, and innovation—the room with its 'R+D' sign speaks of possibility, yet I feel distanced, as if on the threshold between potential and realization. It is both isolating and oddly inviting, making me reflect on the curious solitude found in unoccupied, creative environments.
